display_text: Tier 1 Token. Tier 1: Token that can be activated to redeem a random Tier 1 Neutral Item. The redeemed item is bound to the activating hero and cannot be shared. A hero can only redeem one token per neutral item tier. Stats: Usable at Tier 1.
